document_title: Allgemeine Geschaeftsbedingungen der DIN Media GmbH
storage_permission_basis: Official URL, section references and own paraphrases only.
notes: Sections 5.1-5.6 govern individual, network, machine and AI use.

storage_permission_basis: Official URL and own paraphrases only.
notes: Lists DIN membership, reproduction rights, network licence and isolated closed-loop AI conditions. The current standard offer covers DIN without VDE; no comparable standard offer is identified for VDE or VDI.

storage_permission_basis: Official URL, section references and own paraphrases only.
notes: Nautos rights depend on the offer, service description, IT-AGB and EVB-Nautos; norm acquisition remains subject to DIN Media AGB.

publisher: Bundesministerium der Justiz und Bundesamt fuer Justiz

storage_permission_basis: Official URL and own issue summary only.

publisher: Bundesministerium der Justiz und Bundesamt fuer Justiz
document_title: Urheberrechtsgesetz Paragraph 60d Text und Data Mining fuer wissenschaftliche Forschung
storage_permission_basis: Official URL and own issue summary only.
notes: Whether a student and external AI processing are covered requires university confirmation.

publisher: DBIS / Frankfurt University of Applied Sciences
storage_permission_basis: Official URL, resource id and own access summary only.
notes: Confirms the Frankfurt UAS local licence, campus and WLAN access, VPN access for university members and walk-in access. The institution-specific scope lists DIN, VDI and DWA full texts, DIN-VDE through the separate VDE NormenBibliothek and no ISO or other standards as Nautos online full text.

document_type: general terms for business customers and consumers
storage_permission_basis: Official URL, section references and own paraphrases only.
notes: Sections 8.3 for business customers and 9.3 for consumers prohibit AI processing, AI input and upload of acquired products. Product-specific and individual terms remain controlling.

publisher: DBIS / Frankfurt University of Applied Sciences
storage_permission_basis: Official URL, resource id and own access summary only.
notes: Confirms the Frankfurt UAS local VDE NormenBibliothek licence, campus and WLAN access, VPN access for university members and walk-in access. It provides DIN-VDE full-text viewing, prohibits download and printing and permits copying individual text passages. IEC standards and specialist books are outside the local scope.

storage_permission_basis: Official URL, section references and own paraphrases only.
notes: Sections 1.10-1.12 require case-specific written permission for unlisted uses, reserve text and data mining and prohibit AI processing including permitted excerpts. Sections 2.1-2.3 limit access to authorized users. An institution-specific Frankfurt UAS contract may differ and remains to be confirmed.

storage_permission_basis: Official URL and own rights summary only.
notes: VDI identifies itself as the exclusive rights holder and lists reproduction, electronic use, software use and network storage as licence-dependent uses.

storage_permission_basis: Official URL and own access summary only.
notes: Confirms personally assigned access for registered users but does not document AI, machine-processing, redistribution or repository rights.
